name: @ai-sdk/moonshotai
description: The **[Moonshot AI provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/moonshotai)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model support for the [Moonshot AI](https://platform.moonshot.cn) platform, including the Kimi model serie
